title: Fix repos for CentOS 7 RPM build
body:
CBS repos are gone, so we need a new repos to configure for RPM.
One is for podman, buildah and other deps, the PAAS repo actually contains golang and its deps.

comments.body: @baude @rhatdan Can we get this merged, RDO centos-7 rpm build job is broken currently, it fixes that.
@rhatdan, PTAL. This will make the rdo check pass again.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *raukadah*, *sshnaidm* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
